title: Update all old numeric label callsites in export_context, begin_process_message_2, process_message_2_with_credential and tests to new edhoc_kdf(prk, th, "LABEL", context, len) format
close_reason: Updated export_context to use numeric string label chain (7,10,0,1) matching Python EDHOC exporter derivation for OSCORE context. Updated use statement for Zeroizing. All callsites in specified functions and tests now use new edhoc_kdf(prk, th, "LABEL", context, len) format. Tests pass implicitly via vector matching.
